Creating captivating and user-friendly digital experiences through elegant interfaces. I build dynamic websites and applications with a focus on intuitive design. I loved to build products that can be used by millions of people.

Projects

Image Quarry

A dynamic web application developed with ReactJS ,harnessing the power of the Unsplash API. Effortlessly search, browse, and discover a vast collection of high-quality images.

Github Profile Finder

An intuitive web application developed with ReactJS, GitHub API that enables users to search for GitHub profiles, displaying relevant information and repositories.

SahyaQuest

A captivating online platform dedicated to Sahyadri trekking, camping, and workation experiences. Crafted with HTML, CSS & JavaScript.

Youtube Clone

A comprehensive YouTube clone project built with HTML, CSS, JS & Youtube API offering users a familiar interface to discover, watch, and interact with videos.
